Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\)\); console.log\(keys\)")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('play'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('video'\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\) && k.length < 16\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\).sort\(\).slice\(0, 60\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => ['Quote','Play','CirclePlay','ExternalLink','Share2','Link'].includes\(k\)\)\)")
